fields.name: Source No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the source document that the entry originates from.

fields.name: Source Document
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of document that the line relates to.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code to which the request line is linked.

fields.name: Shipment Method Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the delivery conditions of the related shipment, such as free on board (FOB).

fields.name: Shipping Agent Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the shipping agent who is transporting the items.

fields.name: Shipping Advice
fields.tooltip: Specifies the shipping advice, which informs whether partial deliveries are acceptable.

fields.name: Destination Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the type of destination associated with the warehouse request is a customer or a vendor.

fields.name: Destination No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number or code of the customer or vendor related to the warehouse request.

fields.name: External Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies a document number that refers to the customer's or vendor's numbering system.

fields.name: Expected Receipt Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when receipt of the items is expected.

fields.name: Shipment Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies when items on the document are shipped or were shipped. A shipment date is usually calculated from a requested delivery date plus lead time.

fields.name: Put-away / Pick No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the inventory put-away or pick that was created from this warehouse request.
